zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes de Arderne於1080年出生在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾沃特福德時，她的父親Thomas de Arderne30歲，母親Agnes of Warwick13歲。她於大約1104年與Raufe Arderne在英國爾結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1118年享年38歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Arderne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Ardern
meanings: English: locative name variant of Arden . Arden in Cheshire is recorded as Arderne in 1260, and Arden in Warwicks is recorded as Arderne in 1200.

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes de Arderne was born in 1080, in Watford, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Thomas de Arderne, was 30 and her mother, Agnes of Warwick, was 13. She married Raufe Arderne about 1104, in Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 6 daughters. She died in 1118, at the age of 38.

Elle a épousé Raufe Arderne environ 1104, à Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée en 1118, à l’âge de 38 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnes de Arderneが1080年にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアワトフォードで生まれた時，父Thomas de Arderneは30歳，母Agnes of Warwickは13歳であった。約1104年にイギリスチェシュアイアでRaufe Arderneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1118年に38歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes de Arderne(이)가 1080년 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 왓퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas de Arderne(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes of Warwick(은)는 13세였다. 그녀는 대략 1104년 영국 체실르에서 Raufe Arderne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1118년 38세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes de Arderne родилась в 1080 г. в местности ватфорд, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Thomas de Arderne было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes of Warwick, 13. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Raufe Arderne около 1104 г. в местности чешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Она умерла в 1118 г. в возрасте 38 лет.
